heading: Federal agency consultations
label: 12313 Federal agency consultations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1990section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 101–501section 8621 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Commissioner shall consult and cooperate with the heads of all appropriate Federal agencies or departments administering programs or services that are substantially related to the purposes of this chapter.

children.heading: Interagency agreements
children.label: b Interagency agreements
children.text: To the extent practicable, the Commissioner shall facilitate cooperation through the entering into of interagency agreements.
